codeReview.summary: Reviewed the degraded-serving fix commit, handoff, transcript skeleton, and touched runtime/coins/diagnostics code. The implementation consistently threads runtime state through bootstrap refresh, preserves seeded-bootstrap degraded row semantics on /coins/markets, and aligns diagnostics/source-class reporting with the selected degraded-boot policy covered by targeted stale-data regressions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker repeatedly hit a missing README at /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/README.md because the repo-level README was absent during the worker session, but the current environment now has one. Mission shared state does not explain this recent README movement, so future workers may repeat the same confusion when following the mandated README-first exploration rule.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session 022f786d-c8d2-4f2f-927b-3599545e9a4c shows `Read /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/README.md` returning ENOENT early in the run, while the current repo root now contains README.md per session context and review reads.

summary: Pass. The fix brings /simple/price, /coins/markets, and runtime diagnostics into agreement for stale-live and degraded-bootstrap fallback scenarios, and I found no blocking contract or edge-case gaps in the reviewed change set.
